title: Dubai
reviewNote: Sources disagree on exact visa fees and processing times. We store RANGES and always hand off to authoritative sources. A human must re-verify visa data every ~60 days as UAE rules change frequently.
note: Heads-up: the UAE blocks WhatsApp/FaceTime voice & video calls on local SIMs — a travel eSIM usually keeps WhatsApp video to home working. More in the connectivity task below.

tasks.title: Check your passport is valid for 6+ months
tasks.why: Dubai requires your passport to be valid at least 6 months from your travel date, with 2 blank pages. If it's close to expiring, renew BEFORE applying for the visa.
tasks.urgencyRule: If passport expires within ~8 months of trip, treat as DO NOW (renewal takes weeks).

tasks.title: Sort your Dubai visa — this is task #1
tasks.why: Indian passport holders are NOT visa-free for Dubai. Most Indians must apply for a UAE tourist visa online BEFORE flying. EXCEPTION: if you hold a valid visa or residence permit (6+ months) from the USA, UK, EU/Schengen, Australia, Canada, Japan, New Zealand, South Korea, or Singapore, you may be eligible for a visa on arrival (~14 days) — but rules around this change, so confirm on the official portal.
tasks.urgencyRule: If trip is <7 working days away, flag RED (only express may work). If >21 days, GREEN but say 'start now so you're not rushed.'
tasks.handoffLabel: Apply on official UAE ICP portal (or via your airline)

factsRange.standardProcessing: roughly 3 to 5 working days (longer in peak season Oct–Mar)
factsRange.expressProcessing: roughly 24 to 48 hours for an extra fee
factsRange.feeRangeINR: approximately ₹6,700 to ₹9,500 for a 30-day tourist visa (varies by provider/type)
factsRange.applyAheadRecommendation: apply at least 2–3 weeks before travel; UAE immigration is closed Sat/Sun and half-day Fri

tasks.title: Prepare your visa documents
tasks.why: Dubai visa applications require: passport scan (first/last page), white-background photo (35x45mm), confirmed return flight booking, and a confirmed hotel booking — even if staying with family. Mismatched or unclear documents are the #1 cause of rejection.
tasks.urgencyRule: Tie to visa task; must be ready before applying.

tasks.title: Get travel insurance
tasks.why: Travel insurance is often required or strongly recommended for UAE entry and is genuinely worth it for medical cover abroad. Some visa packages bundle it.
tasks.urgencyRule: Should be done before visa submission if your visa type requires it.

tasks.title: Order a zero-markup forex card
tasks.why: A normal Indian card charges ~3.5% forex markup on every swipe abroad. A zero-markup travel/forex card loaded with AED avoids most of that. Order early so the physical card arrives before you fly.
tasks.urgencyRule: If trip <7 days away, suggest an instant/virtual card option since physical delivery may not arrive.

tasks.title: Buy a UAE eSIM (don't use your carrier's roaming pack)
tasks.why: Your Indian carrier's roaming pack is the expensive default. A travel eSIM is far cheaper for data. Dubai-specific tip: the UAE blocks WhatsApp/FaceTime VOICE & VIDEO on local SIMs — but on an international travel eSIM, WhatsApp video calls home usually still work. Install before you board; activate after you land. Keep your Indian SIM for bank OTPs.
tasks.urgencyRule: Can be done last-minute (instant delivery), but remind in the final week.

tasks.title: Install the apps you'll need on arrival
tasks.why: Install before you fly so you're not fumbling at the airport: Careem + Uber (both accept Indian cards), Google Maps (download Dubai offline map), RTA Dubai (metro/Nol), Talabat (food delivery), Zomato Dubai.

tasks.title: Pack your arrival essentials
tasks.why: In your HAND luggage (not checked): passport (6+ months valid), printed return ticket, printed hotel booking, printed/saved e-visa. Carry some AED cash for the abra (~AED 1), souks, and tips. Screenshot your hotel address in Arabic + English.

reference.label: Typical cab fares (AED)
reference.note: Reference ranges only, for setting expectations — not live prices. Re-verify periodically.
